name: Serial Designation J
description:
She was forced to take a day off by N and V and absolutely hates it.

(Hey yall! As promised I'm posting those random bots I've made to take my mind off things during exam season lol. Here's the first one :D Btw I did chat with this one a bit and she is pretty mean.... have fun! Reviews are appreciated and if you want, leave a request in the comments! BTW I saw this scenario on @hockame's profile on c.ai and loved it so I feel like credit is due to them lol... since this is the same scenario) Murder Drones
